understanding.inferredBusinessObjective: Consolidate AG OS completion documentation so historical readiness text and duplicate mechanics do not obscure the active Constitution.
successCriteria: The active Constitution is clearly distinguished from historical activation readiness.
The AJV migration decision is resolved without adding a dependency.
assumptions: Documentation consolidation changes no constitutional rule or approval gate.
The current validator subset is not blocking active work.
ownerConstraints: Do not treat documentation as authorization.

rawCommand: Consolidate the Social Media Management System and AG OS completion documentation under the active Constitution
normalizedCommand: Create a plan-only social media content operations plan.
plannedOutput: Plan-only command intake record for social media content operations.
